creator: marck@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 22 Aug 2011, Florian Smeets wrote:

> Are you sure this also happens on 8? Which version bsd.gecko.mk are you using?

Latter: yep:

marck@woozle:/usr/ports> ident Mk/bsd.gecko.mk 
Mk/bsd.gecko.mk:
     $FreeBSD: ports/Mk/bsd.gecko.mk,v 1.38 2011/08/20 00:09:08 flo Exp $

Former: stable/7 is still supported branch...

> I think this issue should be fixed already.

Ah, I see, my firefox had been installed @ 2011/08/17, it may be the case.

Thanks!

-- 
Sincerely,
D.Marck                                        [DM5020, MCK-RIPE, DM3-RIPN]
